commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: Needs maintainer acceptance of the source-reply best-effort contract and real Slack proof or override; there is no narrow automated repair left from the current diff.; Cleared: The diff touches core message routing and tests only; I found no concrete security or supply-chain regression. (sha=aff69bbcc6221f5dd79cc3dc6a641588b566f7ae)
commands.review_summary:
The PR forces message-tool-only source replies with omitted or current-source targets onto best-effort delivery while preserving required durable delivery for external targets and adding core-send regression tests.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main maps bestEffort:false to required durable delivery, required durable delivery requires reconcileUnknownSend, and Slack does not declare that capability. I did not run a live Slack reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Needs maintainer acceptance of the source-reply best-effort contract and real Slack proof or override; there is no narrow automated repair left from the current diff.

target.title: fix(messages): use best-effort for implicit tool-only source replies
target.body:
## Summary

- Force implicit and explicit-current-source `message_tool_only` replies through best-effort delivery before target normalization.
- Preserve required durable delivery when the model supplies an explicit external message target with `bestEffort: false`.
- Add regression coverage for the Slack-style adapter path that lacks `reconcileUnknownSend`.

## Root Cause

For Slack group/channel source replies with visible replies routed through the `message` tool, a source-channel reply could still carry `bestEffort: false`, including the case where the tool explicitly supplied the current source channel as `target`. That made the outbound runner request required durable delivery, which then failed preflight on Slack because required durable sends need `reconcileUnknownSend`.

Current-source replies are user-visible conversational replies, not explicit cross-channel durable sends, so they should use best-effort delivery even when the target equals the current source conversation. Explicit external targeted sends keep the existing required durable semantics.

Fixes #84078.

## Real behavior proof

- **Behavior or issue addressed**: `message_tool_only` visible source replies that omit an explicit target, or explicitly target the current source channel, no longer fail the Slack-style durable-send preflight when the channel lacks `reconcileUnknownSend`; explicit external targeted sends still keep required durable behavior.
- **Real environment tested**: Local patched OpenClaw checkout at `aff69bbcc6`, macOS arm64, Node.js `v24.15.0`, OpenClaw runtime loaded from this branch.
- **Exact steps or command run after this patch**: `node --import tsx ../proof-message-tool-only-source-reply.ts`
- **Evidence after fix**:

```text
OpenClaw proof checkout: /Users/tianxiao/Documents/Codex/2026-05-19/openclaw-message-tool-bug/openclaw-community
Implicit source reply status: send/core
Implicit source reply target: channel:C123
Explicit current-source reply status: send/core
Explicit current-source reply target: channel:C123
Source reply sent count: 2
External targeted send error: Required durable message send is unsupported for slack: missing reconcileUnknownSend
External targeted send added messages: 0
```

- **Observed result after fix**: Both current-source `message_tool_only` sends completed through the core outbound path even when the input carried `bestEffort: false`: one omitted the target and one explicitly used `target: "channel:C123"`. The explicit external targeted send with `bestEffort: false` still failed before delivery with `missing reconcileUnknownSend`, preserving the required durable guard for non-source targets.
- **What was not tested**: I did not post a live message into a production Slack workspace; the command used a local direct Slack-shaped channel adapter to avoid sending a real channel message while exercising OpenClaw's patched outbound runner and durable preflight behavior.

## Tests

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.infra.config.ts src/infra/outbound/message-action-runner.core-send.test.ts src/infra/outbound/message-action-runner.send-validation.test.ts src/infra/outbound/outbound-send-service.test.ts src/infra/outbound/message.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.agents-tools.config.ts src/agents/tools/message-tool.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p tsconfig.core.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/core.tsbuildinfo`
target.author: tianxiaochannel-oss88

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
